final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing editorial cover image for a WeChat official account article.

Style/medium: needs a premium, high-quality aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition
Subject: must include the headline "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香" as the focal point
Scene/backdrop: needs an autumn fragrance launch context — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a sophisticated, elegant atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn-inspired direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香"
Constraints: must preserve 900x500 aspect ratio, headline must be prominent
Avoid:
